zh.lifeSummary: John Freeman Sr.於大約1740年出生。他於從大約1758年到1760年與Martha Lynn在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州韋克結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他於1831年住在美國田納西州戴維森納申維爾。他去世於1800年12月在美國北卡羅來納州韋克享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Freeman Sr.于大约1740年出生。他于从大约1758年到1760年与Martha Lynn在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州韋克结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他于1831年住在美国田纳西州戴維森納申維爾。他去世于1800年12月在美国北卡罗来纳州韋克享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Freeman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English freman, fremon ‘freeman, free-born man’ (Old English frēomann, frīgmann), used also occasionally as a personal name. As an African American surname it was in many cases adopted as a name denoting a man freed of slavery. See also Fryman and Free .
Irish: Anglicized (‘translated’) form of Gaelic Ó Saoraidhe (see Seery ).

variants.name: Free
meanings: English: nickname or status name from Middle English fre ‘free’ (Old English frēo), with reference to either tenurial status (‘free born’) or to character (‘noble, generous, open-handed’).
Americanized form of Swiss German and German   Frei   and   Frey  .

variants.name: Fryman
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German Frymann or German Freimann (see Freiman ), and possibly also of the Dutch cognate Vrijman.
English: from Middle English friman ‘free-born man’ (Old English frīomann, frīgmann), symonymous with Freeman 1.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.

historicEvents.title: Becomes 12th State
historicEvents.description: On November 21, 1789, North Carolina became the 12th state in the Union.

en.lifeSummary: John Freeman Sr. was born about 1740. He married Martha Lynn from about 1758 to 1760, in Wake, North Carolina, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 8 daughters. He lived in Nashville, Davidson, Tennessee, United States in 1831. He died in December 1800, in Wake, North Carolina, United States, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: John Freeman Sr. est né environ 1740. Il a épousé Martha Lynn du environ 1758 au 1760, à Wake, Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 8 filles. Il a vécu à Nashville, Davidson, Tennessee, États-Unis en 1831. Il est décédé en décembre 1800, à Wake, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis, à l’âge de 61 ans.

Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 8 Töchter. 1831 hat er in Nashville, Davidson, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. ja.lifeSummary: John Freeman Sr.は約1740年に生まれた。から約1758年まで1760年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州ワクでMartha Lynnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1831年にはアメリカ合衆国テネシー州ダヴィドソンナシュヴィルに住んでいた。彼は1800年12月にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ワクで61歳で死去した。

ko.Wake, North Carolina, British Colonial A: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 웨이크
ko.Wake Co North Carolina: 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 웨이크 노르스 캐럴리나 스타트 유니버짓이 레시르치 유니츠
ko.lifeSummary: John Freeman Sr.(은)는 대략 1740년 태어났다. 그는 대략 1758년 부터 1760년 까지 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 웨이크에서 Martha Lynn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 1831년도에 미국 테네시 주 데이비드슨 나스h빌에서 살았다. 그는 1800년 12월 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 웨이크에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Freeman Sr. nasceu aproximadamente 1740. Ele casou-se com Martha Lynn de aproximadamente 1758 a 1760, em Wake, Carolina do Norte, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele viveu em Nashville, Davidson, Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América em 1831. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1800, em Wake, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John Freeman Sr. родился около 1740 г. Он женился на женщине по имени Martha Lynn с около 1758 по 1760 в местности веик, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он жил в местности нашвилл, дэвидсон, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты в 1831 году. Он умер декабрь 1800 г. в местности веик, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 61 год.
